codeReview.summary: Clean refactoring. All six items (DamageTracker, CompositeSurface+compositing functions, cursor rendering, scale_pointer_coord) fully removed from drawing/lib.rs and placed in appropriate consumers. Compositor gets damage.rs, compositing.rs, cursor.rs as new modules via #[path] include. Core gets scale_pointer_coord as a local function. palette.rs correctly remains in drawing as a shared dependency. All callers updated: compositor/main.rs switches from drawing::DamageTracker to damage::DamageTracker, drawing::DirtyRect to protocol::DirtyRect; compositor/scene_render.rs switches to protocol::DirtyRect; core/main.rs switches to local scale_pointer_coord. Tests use local copies of moved types (established codebase pattern). No stale references remain in any library. Cursor.rs uses manual BGRA byte encoding instead of Color::encode(PixelFormat::Bgra8888) — functionally equivalent for Bgra8888 format. 1,462 tests pass, full clean build succeeds.

issues.description: Unused import: `use drawing::Color;` is imported but never used as a bare name. All color references use fully-qualified `drawing::CURSOR_FILL` and `drawing::CURSOR_OUTLINE`. Dead import; no compile warning fires in the direct-rustc build context but it's unnecessary.
Extra trailing blank lines (3 blank lines) at end of file after code removal. Cosmetic only.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker's skillFeedback.suggestedChanges recommends documenting the test-local-copy pattern in the refactor-worker skill: when moving types from libraries to services, tests need local copies since they can't import from services. This is a recurring pattern in this codebase (also used for TextLayout). The skill's SKILL.md doesn't mention this pattern.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff skillFeedback.suggestedChanges: 'The refactor-worker skill could mention the pattern of creating test-local copies when moving types from libraries to services (since tests can't import from services). This is a common pattern in this codebase.' Also visible in system/test/tests/drawing.rs where both TextLayout (prior move) and DamageTracker/CompositeSurface (this move) are duplicated as test-local types.

summary: PASS. All compositor concerns (DamageTracker, CompositeSurface, cursor, scale_pointer_coord) cleanly removed from drawing library and placed in their consumers. Palette stays in drawing as shared dependency. All callers updated, no stale references, 1,462 tests pass. Two non-blocking cosmetic issues: unused Color import in cursor.rs and trailing blank lines in drawing/lib.rs.
